title: Oceans Drowning in Plastic Waste
subtitle: 每年八百万吨塑料流入海洋，我们还有多少时间

paragraphs.en: Every minute, the equivalent of one garbage truck of plastic enters the world's oceans. This relentless tide of waste has created vast garbage patches and infiltrated even the most remote marine ecosystems. Scientists have found microplastics in creatures living in the deepest ocean trenches.
paragraphs.zh: 每一分钟，都有相当于一辆垃圾车容量的塑料流入世界海洋。这股无情的废物潮已经形成了巨大的垃圾带，甚至渗透到最偏远的海洋生态系统。科学家已在生活于最深海沟的生物体内发现了微塑料。

words.meaning: n. 等量物，adj. 相等的

paragraphs.en: Marine wildlife suffers devastating consequences from plastic pollution. Sea turtles mistake plastic bags for jellyfish, while seabirds feed plastic fragments to their chicks. Entanglement in discarded fishing nets claims the lives of countless whales, dolphins, and seals each year.
paragraphs.zh: 海洋野生动物正遭受塑料污染带来的毁灭性后果。海龟会把塑料袋误认为水母，而海鸟则用塑料碎片喂养它们的幼鸟。每年都有无数鲸鱼、海豚和海豹因被废弃渔网缠绕而丧命。

paragraphs.en: The problem extends beyond visible debris to invisible threats. As plastic breaks down, it releases toxic chemicals that contaminate the food chain. Fish absorb these harmful substances, which eventually reach human dinner tables, creating potential health risks we are only beginning to understand.
paragraphs.zh: 问题已从可见的垃圾延伸到看不见的威胁。随着塑料分解，它会释放出污染食物链的有毒化学物质。鱼类吸收这些有害物质后，最终会到达人类的餐桌，造成我们才刚刚开始了解的潜在健康风险。

paragraphs.en: Innovative solutions are emerging to combat this crisis. Ocean cleanup projects deploy specialized vessels to collect floating waste, while researchers develop biodegradable alternatives to conventional plastics. Some bacteria and enzymes show promise in breaking down plastic materials more rapidly.
paragraphs.zh: 应对这场危机的创新解决方案正在涌现。海洋清理项目部署专业船只收集漂浮废物，研究人员则开发传统塑料的可生物降解替代品。一些细菌和酶在更快速分解塑料材料方面展现出了希望。

paragraphs.en: Individual actions remain crucial in addressing plastic pollution. Reducing single-use plastic consumption, supporting legislation banning harmful products, and participating in coastal cleanups all contribute to the solution. Protecting our oceans requires collective commitment from governments, corporations, and citizens alike.
paragraphs.zh: 个人行动在应对塑料污染方面仍然至关重要。减少一次性塑料消费、支持禁止有害产品的立法、参与海岸清理活动，都有助于解决问题。保护海洋需要政府、企业和公民共同承担责任。
